THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEJIA, JESSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 215 SAN JOSE #3, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, ONLY IF DEFT VACATES ON OR BEFORE OCT 7, 1997 PLTF WAIVES RENT AND DAMAGES AND PLTF WILL PAY DEFT $500-. NO ONE ELSE OCCUPIES PREMISES. MUTUAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS, INCLUDING 1542CC NO FURTHER STAYS. PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE HANDLED ACCORDING TO LAW.
